notes: Section, acts , ; , ; , ; , ; , ; , ; , ; , ; , , set out jurisdiction of United States District Court for District of Puerto Rico and provided for salaries of judge and officials of the court and for filling of vacancies. Section 34 of , , formerly cited as a credit to this section, was not repealed by act .Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 4139 Stat. 965Feb. 25, 1919, ch. 29, § 140 Stat. 1156Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 161, § 141 Stat. 1412Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 29542 Stat. 1560Dec. 13, 1926, ch. 6, § 144 Stat. 919May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158Mar. 26, 1938, ch. 51, § 252 Stat. 118July 31, 1946, ch. 70460 Stat. 716June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 2062 Stat. 989act Apr. 12, 1900, ch. 19131 Stat. 84June 2, 1970
